ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., 70.3, 140.6) */,
  "swim_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the swim segment */,
  "bike_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the bike segment */,
  "run_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the run segment */,
  "course_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL to the official event page */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Organizing body of the event */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Prize money awarded */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
column_names: URL to the official event page
